summary.primaryConclusion: The current validation compares one full Classic router log against an assembled set of feature-split MD-CLI target files. Large unmatched counts are expected; category-specific failures still need analysis.

likelyBugsOrImprovementTargets: Port and LAG identity changed between Classic and MD-CLI; manual mapping or hardware rename mapping is required.
